intro: Hemicyclia sumatrana, also known as Sumatran Hemicyclia, is a plant species belonging to the family Apocynaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory problems, due to its potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Hemicyclia sumatrana include alkaloids, flavonoids, and glycosides, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
